'''鈭歡-j-th''' ('''gajatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaere|quaere]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaere|quaere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-j-th
|-
! Lemma
| gajatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gajathithi|gajathithi]] || [[word:gajathiji|gajathiji]] || [[word:gajathishi|gajathishi]] || [[word:gajathi|gajathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajathuthuth|gajathuthuth]] || [[word:gajathujuj|gajathujuj]] || [[word:gajathushush|gajathushush]] || [[word:gajath|gajath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajathuthu|gajathuthu]] || [[word:gajathuju|gajathuju]] || [[word:gajathushu|gajathushu]] || [[word:gajathu|gajathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajathufuth|gajathufuth]] || [[word:gajathufuj|gajathufuj]] || [[word:gajathufush|gajathufush]] || [[word:gajathuf|gajathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gajathethe|gajathethe]] || [[word:gajatheje|gajatheje]] || [[word:gajatheshe|gajatheshe]] || [[word:gajathe|gajathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajathothoth|gajathothoth]] || [[word:gajathojoj|gajathojoj]] || [[word:gajathoshosh|gajathoshosh]] || [[word:gajath|gajath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajathotho|gajathotho]] || [[word:gajathojo|gajathojo]] || [[word:gajathosho|gajathosho]] || [[word:gajatho|gajatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajathofoth|gajathofoth]] || [[word:gajathofoj|gajathofoj]] || [[word:gajathofosh|gajathofosh]] || [[word:gajathof|gajathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gajath忙th忙|gajath忙th忙]] || [[word:gajath忙j忙|gajath忙j忙]] || [[word:gajath忙sh忙|gajath忙sh忙]] || [[word:gajath忙|gajath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajathathath|gajathathath]] || [[word:gajathajaj|gajathajaj]] || [[word:gajathashash|gajathashash]] || [[word:gajath|gajath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajathatha|gajathatha]] || [[word:gajathaja|gajathaja]] || [[word:gajathasha|gajathasha]] || [[word:gajatha|gajatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajathafath|gajathafath]] || [[word:gajathafaj|gajathafaj]] || [[word:gajathafash|gajathafash]] || [[word:gajathaf|gajathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gajathasha|gajathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogajathasha|gogajathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigajathasha|gokigajathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gajathn眉sha|gajathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogajathnkn眉sha|gogajathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigajathn眉sha|gokigajathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gajathsh毛sha|gajathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogajathnksh毛sha|gogajathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigajathsh毛sha|gokigajathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gajathrosha|gajathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogajathnkrosha|gogajathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigajathrosha|gokigajathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gajathmusha|gajathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogajathnkmusha|gogajathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigajathmusha|gokigajathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gajathsherasha|gajathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogajathnksherasha|gogajathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigajathsherasha|gokigajathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gajathngasha|gajathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogajathnkngasha|gogajathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigajathngasha|gokigajathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gajathyasha|gajathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogajathnkyasha|gogajathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigajathyasha|gokigajathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gajathyamasha|gajathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogajathnkyamasha|gogajathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigajathyamasha|gokigajathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gajathn眉sh毛sha|gajathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogajathnkn眉sh毛sha|gogajathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigajathn眉sh毛sha|gokigajathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gajathn眉rosha|gajathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogajathnkn眉rosha|gogajathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigajathn眉rosha|gokigajathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gajathn眉musha|gajathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogajathnkn眉musha|gogajathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigajathn眉musha|gokigajathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gajathsh毛n眉sha|gajathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogajathnksh毛n眉sha|gogajathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigajathsh毛n眉sha|gokigajathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gajathsh毛rosha|gajathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogajathnksh毛rosha|gogajathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigajathsh毛rosha|gokigajathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gajathsh毛musha|gajathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogajathnksh毛musha|gogajathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigajathsh毛musha|gokigajathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gajathron眉sha|gajathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogajathnkron眉sha|gogajathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigajathron眉sha|gokigajathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gajathrosh毛sha|gajathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogajathnkrosh毛sha|gogajathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigajathrosh毛sha|gokigajathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gajathromusha|gajathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogajathnkromusha|gogajathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigajathromusha|gokigajathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gajathmun眉sha|gajathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogajathnkmun眉sha|gogajathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigajathmun眉sha|gokigajathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gajathmush毛sha|gajathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogajathnkmush毛sha|gogajathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigajathmush毛sha|gokigajathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gajathmurosha|gajathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogajathnkmurosha|gogajathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigajathmurosha|gokigajathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gajath|gajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:g忙j忙th|g忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogajath|hogajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hog忙j忙th|hog忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogajath|hohogajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohog忙j忙th|hohog忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉gajath|n眉gajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉g忙j忙th|n眉g忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉gajath|n眉n眉gajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉g忙j忙th|n眉n眉g忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂gajath|n茂gajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂g忙j忙th|n茂g忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂gajath|n茂n茂gajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂g忙j忙th|n茂n茂g忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugajath|lugajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lug忙j忙th|lug忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugajath|lulugajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulug忙j忙th|lulug忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligajath|ligajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lig忙j忙th|lig忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligajath|liligajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilig忙j忙th|lilig忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogajath|kogajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kog忙j忙th|kog忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogajath|kokogajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokog忙j忙th|kokog忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegajath|kegajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keg忙j忙th|keg忙j忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegajath|kekegajath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeg忙j忙th|kekeg忙j忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
